hooks.command: if [ -n "$BASELINE_CONTEXT_URL" ]; then body=$(curl -s --max-time 5 "$BASELINE_CONTEXT_URL/v1/context?include_memories=true" -H "X-Baseline-Principal: ${BASELINE_PRINCIPAL:-}" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$body" ]; then printf 'Baseline org facts + your memories (source: fact|memory):\n%s\n' "$body"; fi; fi
